Description.EngageAndEarn: Daily Engagement Rewards pays creators who produce enjoyable, replayable gameplay loops.{lineBreak}Earn 5 Robux a day if your experience is one of the first three an Active Spender plays for 10+ minutes that day.
Heading.GrowCommunity: Earn more by growing the community
Description.GrowCommunity: Audience Expansion rewards creators who help grow the platform by bringing new and returning users (inactive 60+ days) to Roblox.{lineBreak}Earn 35% of Robux purchases made by new or returning players in their first two months, when their joining or rejoining Roblox is attributed to your experience.
Description.InfluencerRewards: Members of our Video Stars program can earn both Daily Engagement and Audience Expansion rewards.
Description.ActionableInsights: More transparency means greater agency, helping you fully understand your earnings drivers, and grow your revenue streams. You can track your Creator Rewards using {linkStart}Creator Analytics{linkEnd}:
Description.DailyEngagement: See qualifying engagement events and track which ones convert to a 5 Robux payout based on the attribution rules outlined above.
Description.AudienceExpansion: Monitor both the new and reactivated users you bring to Roblox, and the qualified Robux purchases they make that generate your revenue share.
Description.ShareLinkAnalytics: Analyze detailed performance data for your Share Links, connecting traffic to resulting engagement and potential earnings across both reward types.
Heading.EligibilityFaq: Who is eligible to earn Creator Rewards?
Description.EligibilityFaq: All creators will begin earning Daily Engagement Rewards starting July 24, 2025 — no additional enrollment is required.{lineBreak}To qualify for Audience Expansion Rewards, creators must have an ID-verified account in good standing and a valid DevEx account. {eligibilityLinkStart}Confirm your eligibility{eligibilityLinkEnd}{lineBreak}Members of our {videoStartsLinkStart}Video Stars{videoStartsLinkEnd} program can earn both Daily Engagement and Audience Expansion rewards.
Heading.HowToTrackFaq: How can I track my earnings?
Description.HowToTrackFaq: Creators can track their estimated earnings from Creator Rewards in Creator Hub daily. After the 60 day holding period ends, estimated earnings will be added to your earned Robux balance.
